name: Wei L.
quote: Drove all the way from Subang for the cheese bak kut teh. It did NOT disappoint. The cheese pull was insane and the herbal broth was so flavourful. Will be back!

name: Ahmad F.
quote: Hidden gem above the wet market. The location is quirky but adds to the charm. Creamy chicken cutlet spaghetti was surprisingly good. Prices are super student-friendly.

name: Sarah T.
quote: Been coming here since my TAR UMT days. The honey milk longan is my go-to drink. Cheese BKT is a must-try at least once in your life. Love this place!
